home.heroSub: Discover unique pieces from home boutiques and independent designers across Qatar — all in one place.
home.step1Desc: Register your home boutique for free. Add your shop name, logo, and products in minutes.
home.step2Desc: Upload product photos, set prices in QAR, and write descriptions to attract buyers.
home.step3Desc: Shoppers across Qatar browse and find your boutique. Share your shop link anywhere.
home.step4Desc: Receive inquiries, process orders, and build a loyal customer base — all from one dashboard.
home.why1Desc: No setup fees. Open your boutique and list products completely free. We grow when you grow.
home.why2Desc: Built for the GCC market with Arabic support, QAR pricing, and local payment options.
home.why3Desc: Simple dashboard to add products, manage orders, and message customers — on any device.
home.why4Desc: Get discovered by thousands of fashion shoppers looking for unique local boutiques.
home.ctaSub: Join hundreds of home boutiques already selling on Lines By AMS. It's free to start.
home.emptyShops: Be the first boutique on Lines By AMS!

about.title: Our Story
about.subtitle: Born in Doha. Built for the GCC.
about.story1: Lines By AMS was born in Doha, Qatar, from a simple dream: to give every home boutique a platform to shine. Founded in 2024 by Qatari entrepreneurs, we saw the incredible talent of local designers and home-based fashion sellers going unnoticed — buried in social media feeds, without a professional home to call their own.
about.story2: We built Lines By AMS to change that. Our name represents the lines of fashion — the silhouettes, the stitches, the curves that define every garment. AMS stands for Ambition, Mastery, and Style — the three pillars of Qatar's growing fashion scene.
about.story3: Today, Lines By AMS is Qatar's premier fashion boutique marketplace, connecting hundreds of local boutiques with thousands of shoppers across the GCC. We are proud to be 100% Qatari-made, built for our community, and committed to celebrating the artisans and designers who make our culture beautiful.
about.mission: To empower every Qatari home boutique owner with the tools, visibility, and community they need to turn their passion into a thriving business.
about.val1Desc: We are built by and for the Qatari community. Every feature we build serves the local boutique owner and the customers who love their work.
about.val2Desc: We celebrate original designs, handmade products, and the unique stories behind every boutique. Real fashion, real people.
about.val3Desc: Free to start, simple to use. We remove every barrier between a home business and its first sale.
about.val4Desc: We stand behind every shop on our platform. Your shopping and selling experience is always safe and transparent.
about.ctaSub: Whether you're a boutique owner or a fashion lover, Lines By AMS is your home.
